name: Saute of Summer Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 kirby cucumbers, peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
2 tomatoes, seeded, and cut into 1/2 inch dice
2 cups strips or romaine of washed escarole lettuce
2 teaspoons tarragon or white wine vinegar
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. When the oil is hot, add the onions and cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Add the cucumbers and radishes and sauté for about 1 minute or just until hot.
4. Add the tomatoes and lettuce to the skillet and continue to sauté until the lettuce wilts.
5. Remove the skillet from heat, add the vinegar, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 4 servings
